resources.string: Later screens can request SMS, email and notification permissions with full user consent.
Track expenses from SMS and email alerts
PennyWise is designed to turn transaction messages and email receipts into one simple expense timeline.
See daily, weekly, monthly and yearly spend
Clear summaries and graphs help you understand how money moves over time without manually entering each expense.
Know where your money is going
We will group transactions into categories so you can spot patterns like food, travel, bills and shopping faster.
